title: Zygophlebia subpinnata
taxonomy: Zygophlebia subpinnata is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis. The genus Zygophlebia is part of the family Lomariopsidaceae, which is a group of ferns that are mainly epiphytic in nature. The family Lomariopsidaceae is a member of the order Polypodiales, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. Zygophlebia subpinnata is a unique species within this classification due to its specific leaf morphology and growth habits.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information about the medicinal uses of the plant Zygophlebia subpinnata.
